_comment: Global game tunables. Edit pacing, debt, and which phone apps are on without touching code.
title: BANDSCAPE
tagline: broke, in debt, and weirdly optimistic

time._comment: realMsPerGameMinute: how many real milliseconds = 1 in-game minute. dayStartHour: what time you wake up. curfewHour: if you push past this you pass out and lose the rest of the night.

apps._comment: true = working app, false = shows a 'coming soon' teaser. Later steps flip these on.
